headline: What Moved Markets This Week
summary: U.S. stocks ended the week higher as stocks rebounded from an early-week selloff amid latest inflation data. Read more about this week's major events on Wall Street.

headline: SpaceX, Super Micro Computer, Micron And More: 5 Stocks Investors Couldn't Stop Buzzing About This Week
